page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9ae.48xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at a base frequency of 2.25 GHz. This instance features 192 dedicated physical cores and 192 vCPUs, operating with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. It is equipped with 1536.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

The instance runs on the KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage, requiring external block storage solutions for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers. There are no bundled GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this configuration.

Given the high density of dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores and substantial memory capacity, this instance is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. The 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio provides a balanced resource profile for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data processing pipelines. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent compute performance without resource contention, making it suitable for predictable, large-scale production workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9ae.48xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor operating at 2.25 GHz. It features 192 dedicated physical cores and 192 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, eliminating hyperthreading resource sharing. The instance is equipped with 1536.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB. It operates on the KVM hypervisor and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying on network-attached storage for data persistence. The high memory density and dedicated CPU allocation make this instance suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and complex data processing workloads that require consistent compute performance and substantial memory capacity.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9ae.48xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 192 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 1536 GB RAM, and 100 Gbps network bandwidth for large-scale enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high-speed networking for demanding enterprise database workloads.

1536.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
